positive: An intricate, stylized depiction of a glowing bioluminescent forest landscape at twilight. The foreground features elegant, stylized flora and fauna silhouettes—like glowing moths and whimsical leaf structures—against the rich, deep sapphire and amethyst tones of the night sky. A path formed by softly glowing moss leads the eye towards a central, monumental, crystalline tree structure that emits a soft, warm, emerald light. The style should be a fusion of detailed Art Nouveau engraving and modern celestial watercolor. Use strong contrast between the dark, saturated silhouettes and the bright, glowing internal light sources. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly scalable for textile printing, with clear lines and easily defined shapes. Flat vector elements must be integrated into the organic structures. Golden hour glow mixed with deep space nebulae colors.
negative: blur, realistic photo, low contrast, messy, artifacts, watermarks, text, cropped, bad anatomy, noise, extra limbs, jpeg compression, grain
